User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the BookNGlow platform, which can be either a customer or a salon owner.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for authentication and contact.

role.description: The role of the user within the platform, either 'customer' or 'salon'.

fullName.description: The full name of the customer, only applicable if the user's role is 'customer'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

Salon.title: Salon
Salon.description: Represents a salon registered on the BookNGlow platform, managed by a salon owner.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Salon entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who owns and manages this salon. (Relationship: User 1:1 Salon)

name.description: The official name of the salon.

localityId.description: Reference to the Locality where the salon is physically located. (Relationship: Locality 1:N Salon)

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email address for the salon.

categoryTier.description: The category or tier level of the salon (e.g., Standard, Premium, Elite).

averagePriceRange.description: An indicator of the average price range for services offered by the salon.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the salon record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the salon record was last updated.

ServiceCategory.title: ServiceCategory
ServiceCategory.description: Defines the different categories of services available at salons (e.g., Hair, Skin, Nails).

id.description: Unique identifier for the ServiceCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the service category (e.g., 'Hair', 'Skin', 'Nails').

description.description: A brief description of the service category.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon image representing this service category.

Locality.title: Locality
Locality.description: Represents a specific geographical locality within Dehradun where salons can be found.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Locality entity.

name.description: The name of the locality (e.g., 'Rajpur Road', 'Jakhan').

city.description: The city to which this locality belongs (e.g., 'Dehradun').

state.description: The state to which this locality belongs.

country.description: The country to which this locality belongs.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a service booking made by a customer at a specific salon.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Booking entity.

customerId.description: UID of the user who made the booking.

salonId.description: ID of the salon where the service is booked.

salonName.description: Name of the salon at the time of booking.

date.description: The date of the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

time.description: The time of the appointment (e.g., '10:00 AM').

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the booking was created.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores public profiles and details for each salon.

params.name: salonId
params.description: The unique identifier for the salon.

params.name: serviceCategoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a service category.

params.name: localityId
params.description: The unique identifier for a locality.

definition.description: Stores service bookings. Read access for availability checks and user history, write access for booking creation.

params.name: bookingId
params.description: The unique identifier for a booking.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is updated to include a 'bookings' collection. This allows for real-time availability checks and persistence of appointments. Security rules are configured to allow signed-in users to list bookings (for availability) and create their own bookings, while protecting individual privacy.
